name: Karim Yazji
title: Chief Executive Officer
bio: Karim leads ASK Real Estate as Chief Executive Officer, overseeing a portfolio exceeding $3 billion in assets under management across Bahrain. With extensive executive experience in GCC real estate, he has built ASK into a full-service firm trusted by institutional investors and private clients alike, delivering end-to-end solutions across residential, commercial, and hospitality asset classes.

name: Shehab Mohsen
title: Head of Facility Management
bio: Shehab heads ASK's Facility Management division, delivering comprehensive FM services for residential towers, commercial properties, and mixed-use developments across Bahrain. His operational expertise ensures properties under ASK management maintain the highest standards of upkeep and tenant satisfaction.

name: Samer Nayal
title: Business Development Manager
bio: Samer drives ASK Real Estate's business development strategy, forging partnerships with developers, investors, and institutional clients. His deep understanding of Bahrain's real estate market and regional networks has been instrumental in growing ASK's portfolio and service offerings.

name: Shinu Kochuthoppil
title: Valuation Manager
bio: Shinu leads ASK's RICS and IVSC-accredited valuation practice, providing independent property valuations for mortgage, investment, and legal purposes across Bahrain. His rigorous methodology and market expertise make him a trusted advisor for banks, developers, and private investors requiring certified valuations.

name: Mohamed Omar
title: Head of Property Management
bio: Mohamed oversees ASK's property management portfolio, ensuring landlords and investors receive maximum returns from their assets. Specialising in residential and commercial property management, he coordinates maintenance, tenant relations, and lease renewals across ASK's managed properties in Bahrain.

name: Sara Ali
title: Marketing Manager
bio: Sara leads ASK Real Estate's marketing and brand strategy, managing the company's digital presence, social media channels, and property marketing campaigns. Her creative direction and market positioning have helped establish ASK as one of Bahrain's most recognisable real estate brands.

name: Fatima Ghazi
title: HR and Administration Manager
bio: Fatima manages ASK Real Estate's human resources and administrative operations, ensuring the team is well-supported, compliant, and growing. She oversees recruitment, staff development, and the administrative backbone that keeps ASK running smoothly across all its service divisions.

name: Neelika Mahawatte
title: Head of Finance & Accounts
bio: Neelika heads ASK's finance and accounts department, managing financial reporting, budgeting, and compliance across the company's diverse portfolio. Her expertise ensures ASK maintains full financial transparency and regulatory compliance across all its operations in Bahrain.

name: Hussain Hussaini
title: Sales Manager
bio: Hussain leads ASK's sales team, driving residential and commercial property transactions across Bahrain's key districts. With a strong track record in closing high-value deals and managing client relationships, he ensures every buyer and investor is matched with the right property at the right price.

name: Philip John
title: QHSE Manager
bio: Philip manages ASK Real Estate's Quality, Health, Safety and Environment (QHSE) standards across all operations. His rigorous approach to compliance and safety ensures ASK's properties and projects meet international standards, underpinning the company's ISO 9001 certification.
